name: CYOA Parasite Takeover
description:
A parasite has begun to spread around the world. The parasite's only goal is to spread to every living host. Do you try to survive and combat this parasite or do you become a vessel for it?

I recommend turning the temp to .85-.65 and please give feedback positive or negative. This is also still new and will be being tweaked, comments and feedback are always appreciated.
creator: Eva's Futa
